items.title: Man wanted for pouring drink in baptismal font, stealing donations in suspected hate crime at Queens church
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: France's Muslim gathering ban overturned by courts
items.dek: The Paris police department had argued that the four-day gathering was a security threat because it could be a target of terrorism.
items.body: The Paris police department had argued that the four-day gathering was a security threat because it could be a target of terrorism.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Who is Christopher LaNeve, set to lead the US army?
items.dek: He will replace Randy George, who was asked to step down from his post by Defence Secretary Pete Hegseth.
items.body: He will replace Randy George, who was asked to step down from his post by Defence Secretary Pete Hegseth.
items.author: IriLine Desk
